description: Create a transient isolation map to identify transient artifacts (like cosmic rays or satellite trails) while removing the static star field using the 20 FITS files in ~/AstroImages/transient_search/frames/. Generate a Median projection and save it to ~/AstroImages/transient_search/output/median_stack.fits. Generate a Maximum Intensity projection and save it to ~/AstroImages/transient_search/output/max_stack.fits. Subtract the Median projection from the Maximum projection using a 32-bit float result and save the difference image to ~/AstroImages/transient_search/output/transients_only.fits. Measure the maximum pixel value in the resulting transients_only.fits image and record it as 'Max_Transient_Value: [value]' in ~/AstroImages/transient_search/output/transient_stats.txt.
